Off Calendar May-22-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Lois Jones.
Pltiff, Hayward Wong present with counsel, David Green.
Plaintiff was sworn and examined,
Exhibit 1 - Signed Lease agreement-------------------ID/EVD.
The Court hears evidence and grants default judgment in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant, Pascual Huizar, dba Pascual's Upholstery as follows:
Money judgment, Principal $172,780.30,
Pre judgment interest $3,465.46, Attorney's fee $3,080.00, Costs $371.21.
Post judgment interest as allowed by law. Plaintiff waives late fees.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibit.
Judgment signed in open court.
